seoTitle: Tambo Crossing vs Tambo Upper — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tambo Crossing and Tambo Upper. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Tambo Crossing vs Tambo Upper: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tambo Crossing and Tambo Upper.
heading: Tambo Crossing vs Tambo Upper — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tambo Crossing, Victoria and Tambo Upper, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tambo Crossing has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Tambo Upper (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tambo Crossing or Tambo Upper safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tambo Crossing has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Tambo Upper scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tambo Crossing scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Tambo Upper scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tambo Crossing or Tambo Upper?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tambo Crossing has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
